Dakshayani Das is a DHA licensed Specialist Orthodontist with an MDS in Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopedics, offering refined, precision-driven orthodontic care in Dubai. With extensive post-specialty clinical experience across India and the Maldives, she has successfully treated hundreds of comprehensive orthodontic cases, delivering results that combine functional excellence with facial harmony.

Her expertise includes advanced fixed appliance systems, clear aligner therapy, growth modification, and skeletal anchorage techniques. Invisalign certified, Dr. Dakshayani is known for her meticulous diagnosis, customized treatment planning, and commitment to long term stability. She believes that orthodontics is both a science and an art enhancing not only alignment, but confidence and overall facial balance.

Srajal Khandelwal is a Specialist Orthodontist with over eight years of experience in treating a wide range of dental misalignments and malocclusions in both children and adults. She completed her Bachelor’s degree in Dentistry and Master’s degree in Orthodontics from India, building a strong background in advanced orthodontic care.

She has over five years of clinical dental experience, and is committed to restoring both the health as well as aesthetics of her patients smiles. She focuses on comprehensive procedures, including full mouth rehab and smile designing. From performing in-office aesthetic restorations to providing customized lab-made veneers, Dr. Diksha offers a wide spectrum of dental solutions.

Cookies We use cookies and tracking pixels on this site like most websites. Our Mission At Next Care Dental Clinic, our mission is to provide exceptional dental care that prioritizes oral health, patient comfort, and overall well-being. We are dedicated to improving lives one smile at a time by delivering expert treatments, fostering trust, and creating a welcoming environment where every patient feels valued and cared for.

Expert Tips A confident smile can transform the way you look and feel. Whether you’re considering teeth whitening, veneers, smile makeovers, or dental bonding, choosing the best cosmetic dentist in Deira, Dubai is the most important step. With so many clinics available, knowing what to look for can save you time, money, and disappointment.

Scaling & Polishing Gentle deep clean removing difficult plaque, tartar, and surface stains to leave you with fresher breath and a brighter smile. Painless polishing of your teeth by us keeps your teeth smooth and cavity-free.
